name: Beef Stroganov
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Top sirloin, cut into thin strips (1 inch wide)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine flour and salt and pepper to taste.
2. Add beef strips and toss to coat evenly.
3. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add onion and cook until just beginning to become tender.
5. Add mushrooms and cook briefly. Remove from pan.
6. Add additional 2-3 tablespoons butter as necessary to sauté meat.
7. Add floured beef and cook until lightly browned.
8. Combine beef and onion-mushroom mixture in a casserole dish.
9. Stir in tomato sauce and tuck in bay leaf. Cover and bake at 350°F for about 1 hour, or until meat is tender.
10. Just before serving, stir in sour cream.
